title: Resolva 24H 3L Weedkiller +20% Extra Free, Ready to Use
features: Brakes down naturally in the soil
description: From the manufacturer Resolva Weedkiller 24H RTU Weeds can be a problem around the garden especially if you let them grow. They will compete for the same space and nutrients as your plants and if left untreated they will create seedlings and spread further. Using Resolva Weedkiller 24H RTU gives you the confidence that the weed will be killed fast, right down to the root, so they don’t come back! Resolva Weedkiller 24H RTU controls a wide spectrum of annual and deep rooted perennial weeds including Grasses, Couch grass, Docks, Thistles, Nettles, Dandelions, Bindweed & many more weeds. Key Benefits Kills weeds & roots fast Visible effects after 24 hours Kills the roots so weeds don’t come back Unique non-drip trigger Contains glyphosate
